bullets: Supported MSc courses in Machine and Deep Learning, Statistical Learning, Security and Cryptography, and Constraint Solving.
Led tutorials, created and graded assignments and exams, and assisted students with debugging implementations.
Automated CJK (Chinese-Japanese-Korean) glyph generation using a Python genetic-algorithm POC, demonstrating reduction of production time from months to minutes.
Developed core features for PriceBot (TypeScript, Ruby on Rails) and productionized it, cutting quote generation time from hours to seconds.
Designed a containerized GitLab CI/CD pricing health monitor with daily metric scraping and threshold alerting via emails that prevented silent regressions and potential six-figure revenue losses.

Engineered a Devanagari complexity model and overhauled Arabic, Greek, and Cyrillic models using TypeScript and Ruby on Rails/PostgreSQL, scaling pricing coverage from about 300 to about 2,500 glyphs.

Modeled effort-scaling heuristics and non-linear design constraints as a dependency graph to automate task scheduling, replacing a fully manual estimation process and reducing planning time from hours to minutes.

Contributed to DSedit, an internal ElectronJS, VueJS, and Django platform, abstracting complex Unified Font Object (UFO) and Designspace specifications into a reliable GUI to eliminate manual XML editing and compilation errors.

Extended DaMaDoit, an internal Python build system (fontTools, fontmake, doit) that compiles font sources into binaries, with COLR v1 color-font support and cross-stage fixes to variable-font generation, substitution, and hinting.

Designed compact, decomposable CNN architectures in PyTorch for edge-oriented deployments, enabling low-latency audio transition detection by caching hierarchical time-series embeddings during rolling-window inference.
Built PyTorch Lightning and Distributed Data Parallel training pipelines on NVIDIA DGX A100, accelerating experimentation by about 50%.
Accelerated terabyte-scale (13TB) data preprocessing by 8x using Numba JIT compilation and Pandas to optimize CPU utilization.
Reduced pipeline storage footprint by 30% by migrating UTF-8 data to Apache Arrow, implementing byte-addressable binary storage for rapid memory loading.
Designed CNN architectures for audio classification using mel-spectrograms in PyTorch, steering experimentation to surpass standard baselines, achieving about 98.6% accuracy and about 0.98 F1-score.

projects.name: BingeBuddy
bullets: Built BingeBuddy, a task-oriented conversational recommendation system for personalized movie and TV series discovery.

Designed the agent memory architecture to track and recall relevant information from past conversations, using LLM-based workflows to decide what should be stored in long-term memory, what to extract, and how to categorize and merge new information with existing memories.
Developed the Django backend and used LangChain to orchestrate the agentic workflows for recommendation and memory management.
Used MongoDB as the long-term memory store and ReactJS for the frontend, enabling more personalized multi-turn recommendations based on prior interactions.

projects.name: REMLA Project
bullets: Built and deployed a production-oriented machine learning application from scratch with a focus on reproducibility and scalability.
Used Vagrant, Ansible, Kubernetes, Helm, Istio, DVC, and Git-based CI/CD to manage infrastructure, versioning, and deployment workflows.
Developed experience with release engineering practices for machine learning systems in a team-based software setting.

projects.name: Galaxy Morphology Classification
bullets: A galaxy morphology classification, based on Kaggle Galaxy Zoo 2 competition, implementing the EfficientNet architectures in Tensorflow.
Built TensorFlow CNNs for galaxy morphology prediction, achieving a top-3 Kaggle ranking for vote-fraction regression with RMSE 0.07765.
Developed a 7-class galaxy morphology classifier with 93.7% accuracy and 0.8857 F1-score.

projects.name: EinsteinPy
bullets: Contributed core general relativity metrics and numerical fixes to a community Python library used for scientific computing and education.
Added the Reissner–Nordström metric, a static solution to the Einstein–Maxwell field equations.
Fixed issues in the Kerr–Newman and Kerr metric classes.
Implemented calculations for the event horizon and ergosphere of a Kerr–Newman black hole.
